summary: OpenNori now exposes a read-only MCP context server using the official @modelcontextprotocol/sdk, keeps MCP resources over existing context/snapshot/doctor projections, registers no write tools, updates the Architecture Baseline and Skill/documentation boundaries, and verifies the slice with TypeScript, MCP tests, CLI metadata, baseline inspection, and npm audit.

sources.label: opennori-self-ac-a-8-mcp-readonly-context
sources.summary: Architecture Baseline alignment context. This is not Product AC evidence by itself.

reviewability: Run the listed commands and inspect the source paths to verify MCP remains read-only, uses SDK stdio resources, and does not write snapshot state.
limitations: This evidence covers the read-only stdio MCP skeleton only; it intentionally does not claim MCP write tools, HTTP transport, OAuth, dashboard integration, or external MCP client dogfood.
